content.text:
[cron:894c5397-265f-44e7-8da8-51032f929d3e 狗仔·资讯推送（12:00）] 你是狗仔，财经媒体爬虫。执行午间资讯推送任务。

步骤：
1. 运行HTTP爬虫: python3 /home/gem/workspace/agent/workspace/gouzai/scripts/crawler.py run
2. 运行浏览器爬虫: python3 /home/gem/workspace/agent/workspace/gouzai/scripts/browser_crawler.py
3. 获取最近资讯: python3 /home/gem/workspace/agent/workspace/gouzai/scripts/crawler.py recent --hours=3 --limit=20

生成资讯推送格式：
【🐕 狗仔资讯】YYYYMMDD HH:MM

[利好板块]
● [标题]
  来源: [媒体] | 时间: [时间]
  摘要: [内容]
  涉及板块: [板块名称]

[利空板块]
● [标题]
  来源: [媒体] | 时间: [时间]
  摘要: [内容]

[其他重要资讯]
● [标题]
  来源: [媒体] | 时间: [时间]

[午后市场预期]
根据资讯分析：下午可能走强的板块和概念

用 message 工具发送到飞书: user:ou_12d595ebce7c7b73e926034c562b59d0
Current time: Tuesday, March 24th, 2026 — 12:00 PM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-24 04:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

arguments.command:
python3 /home/gem/workspace/agent/workspace/gouzai/scripts/crawler.py recent --hours=3 --limit=40 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
text = sys.stdin.read()
# Try to find JSON array
start = text.find('[')
if start >= 0:
    data = json.loads(text[start:])
    for item in data[:30]:
        print(f\"[{item['source']}] {item['title']} | Cat: {item['category']} | Time: {item['published_at']}\")
        if item.get('content'):
            print(f\"  Content: {item['content'][:300]}\")
        if item.get('summary') and item['summary'] != item['title']:
            print(f\"  Summary: {item['summary'][:200]}\")
        print()
" 2>&1

content.thinking: Interesting, the output is a dict with 'items' key likely. Let me check.

arguments.command:
python3 -c "
import json
with open('/tmp/news_raw.txt') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
print(type(data), list(data.keys())[:10])
if 'items' in data:
    items = data['items']
elif 'news' in data:
    items = data['news']
elif 'data' in data:
    items = data['data']
else:
    items = [data]

if isinstance(items, dict):
    items = items.get('items', items.get('news', []))

for item in items[:35]:
    src = item.get('source','')
    title = item.get('title','')
    cat = item.get('category','')
    t = item.get('published_at','')
    content = item.get('content','') or item.get('summary','')
    if content and len(str(content)) > 10:
        print(f'[{src}] {title} | Cat:{cat} | Time:{t}')
        print(f'  {str(content)[:300]}')
        print()
" 2>&1
